name: e-commerce-data-pipeline
postCreateCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdir -p /workspaces/e-commerce-data-pipeline/airflow/.gcp && printf '%s' "$GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_KEY" > /workspaces/e-commerce-data-pipeline/airflow/.gcp/keyfile.json && chmod 600 /workspaces/e-commerce-data-pipeline/airflow/.gcp/keyfile.json
